products.name: BPM Workflow Generator
products.description: Generate BPMN workflows from a YAML spec — no clicking around in the editor.
products.longDescription:
A code-first complement to the BPM Studio. Define your process in a YAML file, run a single command, and the toolkit emits the BPMN XML and registers it against your workflow engine.

What it does

  • Compiles YAML process definitions into valid BPMN 2.0 XML.
  • Validates against the schema before installing.
  • Supports timer events, sub-processes, and inclusive gateways.

reviews.comment: Improved our workflows significantly. Easy to configure and works well with existing systems.
Stable and well-documented.
Saves me hours every sprint.

products.name: AI Sentiment Analyzer
products.description: Automatically detect tone and sentiment in CRM emails and support tickets.
products.longDescription:
Leverage local LLMs to categorize incoming communication. Tag tickets as 'Frustrated', 'Happy', or 'Urgent' before a human even reads them.

Features

  • Zero-latency processing.
  • Customizable sentiment thresholds.
  • Dashboard widgets for overall customer health.

reviews.comment: Does what it promises perfectly. Good value for the functionality provided. Team adopted it quickly without much training needed.
The urgency detection is spot on.
Improved our workflows significantly. Easy to configure and works well with existing systems.
Excellent tool with reliable and intuitive interface. Integration was smooth and support was responsive throughout the entire process.

products.name: Smart Invoice Parser
products.description: Extract data from PDF invoices and auto-create accounting entries.
products.longDescription:
Stop manual data entry. This app uses OCR and pattern matching to extract vendor, amount, tax, and line items from any PDF invoice.

Why use it?

  • 99% accuracy on standard formats.
  • Learns from corrections.
  • Direct integration with Axelor Accounting.

versions.changelog: Initial release with basic PDF support.
Improved OCR engine for handwritten notes.
Small fix for tax calculation on edge cases.
Added support for ZUGFeRD and Factur-X formats.
Direct integration with Axelor Document Management.
Enhanced security for encrypted PDF files.
WIP: Next generation parser with cloud-sync.

reviews.comment: Game changer for our accounting department.
Worth every penny.
Very good, but struggling with some complex layouts.
Solid invoice automation. Handles multiple formats and languages. Integration with our payment system works seamlessly.
Incredible accuracy.
Highly recommended.
Support was very helpful during setup.
Our invoice processing backlog is gone. Vendor management became proactive. Payment terms are automatically calculated and applied.
Best in class.

products.name: Inventory Optimizer
products.description: Predictive stock management to reduce waste and prevent stockouts.
products.longDescription: Uses historical sales data to suggest optimal reorder points. Works across multiple warehouses.

reviews.comment: Very solid plugin. The reporting features are comprehensive and give us the visibility we needed. Only downside is the setup took a bit longer than expected.
Worth every cent. We use this daily and it has become indispensable. The automated reorder suggestions alone have saved us from stockouts.
This tool has fundamentally changed how we manage inventory. The predictive analytics are spot-on and have helped us reduce excess stock by 25%. Integration with our existing workflows was seamless.

products.name: HR Onboarding Toolkit

products.longDescription: Create a seamless experience for new employees. Assign tasks to IT, Finance, and Managers automatically.

reviews.comment: Onboarding new employees used to be chaotic with documents scattered everywhere. This toolkit centralizes everything and automates the checklist process completely.
Good solution overall. Handles the basics very well, though we had to use some workarounds for our unique approval chains. Support helped us find solutions quickly.
The template library is excellent and saves hours of configuration. We customized it for our workflows in under an hour, and employees love the clear onboarding experience.

products.name: Visual SQL Query Builder
products.description: Build complex SQL queries without writing a single line of code.
products.longDescription: Drag and drop tables, join them visually, and apply filters. Export as SQL or use directly in reports.

reviews.comment: As a developer, this saves me significant time writing queries. The visual interface is clean and does not hide the SQL, so I can still inspect and optimize when needed.
Powerful tool for building complex queries without memorizing every syntax rule. Performance has been solid on our 500GB+ datasets. Feature request: saved query templates across the team.
Our non-technical analysts can now pull reports without bothering developers. Training took 30 minutes and they were productive immediately. This has been a game-changer.

products.name: Analytics Dashboard Pro
products.description: High-performance data visualization for your Axelor dashboard.
products.longDescription: Stunning charts and real-time updates for all your key metrics. Supports Drill-down and export to PDF/Excel.

reviews.comment: The customization options are endless. We went from basic KPI displays to advanced trend analysis with forecast overlays. Performance is snappy even with millions of data points.
Built a company-wide analytics dashboard in half the time expected. The chart library is extensive and real-time refresh capability keeps executives with current information always available.
Solid enterprise tool. Dashboard creation workflow is smooth, though export features could be more comprehensive. Overall very happy with the investment.

products.name: Visual Warehouse Mapping
products.description: Manage your stock locations with a 2D/3D map of your warehouse.
products.longDescription: Optimize picking routes and see stock levels by location visually. Integrates with existing inventory modules.

reviews.comment: Mobile app integration is fantastic. Our warehouse crew can check optimal paths from their phones. Has genuinely improved operational efficiency and worker satisfaction greatly.
Great visualization tool with solid fundamentals. The heatmap feature showing high-traffic zones has helped us reorganize layout for efficiency significantly.
Warehouse operations are completely different now. We can visualize inventory locations, optimize picking routes, and train new staff using the interactive maps effectively.
